enrichment.summary: Kyle films a short morning vlog from Boulder, describing his day after working until midnight. He mentions working on unspecified projects involving large pictures, fixing a supplies mistake, and working on a personal Bible page he finds surprisingly basic but improvable.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: finds it surprisingly basic but believes he can improve it
got ahead of himself but enough is working to see it has potential
